name: @quoin/vocab-daisy
description: DaisyUI-flavoured primitives — alert tile, badge tag, bordered card, divider, indicator dot, modal shell.

attribution.harvestNotes: Extracts DaisyUI's semantic-class style (alert, badge, card, divider, indicator, modal) into Quoin primitives. DaisyUI itself is the prior art that validated semantic compression on top of Tailwind; Quoin extends the same compression one layer higher.
